title: verbascum × rilaense
intro: Verbascum × rilaense, also known as the Rila mullein, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mullein genus, known for its large, yellow flowers and fuzzy leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × rilaense include reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of colds and flu, and even showing promise in treating skin conditions like eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream, and is often used in herbal remedies to support lung health and soothe irritated skin.
